query:
-- Check DID Australia services - what type are they?
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.serviceType, s.billingPlatform,
       -- check workbook line item type
       (SELECT li.productType FROM supplier_workbook_line_items li
        JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads wu ON wu.id = li.uploadId
        WHERE wu.supplier = 'SasBoss' AND li.matchedServiceExternalId = s.externalId
        ORDER BY wu.importedAt DESC LIMIT 1) as wbProductType
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName = 'DID Australia (1)'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
  AND s.billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%'
LIMIT 5;

-- Also check what pricebook entries exist for DID Australia (1)
SELECT id, product_name, sheet_name, partner_buy_price FROM sasboss_pricebook_items
WHERE product_name LIKE '%DID Australia%' AND version_id = 2;

        WHERE wu.supplier = 'SasBoss' AND li.matchedServiceExternalId = s.externalId

FROM services s
WHERE s.planName = 'DID Australia (1)'

-- Also check what pricebook entries exist for DID Australia (1)

WHERE product_name LIKE '%DID Australia%' AND version_id = 2;
